/usr/bin/ar qc libctc_sigma.a CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/arith.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/braid.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/branch.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/constants.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/ctc_sigma.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/encoder.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/field.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/fold.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/keccak.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/lehmer.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/permutation.c.o CMakeFiles/ctc_sigma_static.dir/src/sponge.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libctc_sigma.a
